caption: In a large, carpeted indoor hall with warm overhead lighting and ornate chandeliers, several practitioners are performing synchronized martial arts movements. A central figure, dressed in a cream-colored traditional outfit, leads the group, while others around him wear blue or purple traditional attire. In the initial sequence, the practitioners stand in various balanced stances with their arms extended in coordinated motions. As the sequence progresses, the group transitions into a dynamic, low-lunging posture. The central figure shifts his weight deeply onto his back leg and thrusts his arm forward in a striking motion, while the others mirror this shift in posture. The background features a large audience seated in dimmed lighting, observing the demonstration. There is no on-screen text or logos visible. The scene evolves from a controlled, standing position to a more explosive, athletic movement across the group.
